name: brand-ads-generate
description: Generate on-brand paid-ad creative variations from your brand context plus cross-industry inspiration, with on-image CTA text rendered inline by an image-to-image model. Brand-agnostic — onboards new users via 7 conversational questions on first run, then reads voice/visual/playbook context from a workspace-local Brand/ vault. Pairs with the kie-ai plugin from this marketplace.
